synopsis:
Leia Organa, Luke Skywalker, and the droids answer a beacon on a jungle world left by Prince Denid of Velmor, who crash-landed there years earlier in a wreck that killed his betrothed, Loren, and left his friend Jedidiah, once a potential Jedi Knight, addle-brained. Denid must return to Velmor to claim the rite of succession or his Imperial-sympathizing younger brother, Anod, will seize the throne. With Luke disguised as a bounty hunter and Leia posing as Loren, they escort Denid home just in time to interrupt Anod's coronation.

This frustrates Anod, the schemer Zelor, and Imperial Captain Zeta Traal, each pursuing power of their own. At a ceremonial Mrid Hunt, Traal plots to have Denid and Leia killed; in the ensuing battle Anod wounds them but is killed by Traal, and Luke defeats Zelor in a sword duel. Jedidiah sacrifices himself to stop Traal from capturing Luke. With the conspirators dead or captured, Denid takes the throne and pledges support to the Rebellion, and Luke gives Jedidiah a hero's funeral in space.
title: Star Wars (1977) #49: The Last Jedi
